nasb.text: I will leave you on the land; I will cast you on the open field. And I will cause all the birds of the heavens to dwell on you, And I will satisfy the beasts of the whole earth with you.

esv.text: And I will cast you on the ground; on the open field I will fling you, and will cause all the birds of the heavens to settle on you, and I will gorge the beasts of the whole earth with you.

cnv.text: 我必把你丟棄在地上， 拋擲在田野， 使空中的飛鳥都住在你身上， 使地上所有的野獸都吃你而得飽足。

ccb.text: 抛在地上，丢在田野， 给天上的飞鸟吃， 让地上的走兽饱餐。
